name: Section 457(b) Last 3-Year Catch-Up

eligibility.description: Participants in an eligible 457(b) plan within 3 taxable years of reaching normal retirement age.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows participants in the last 3 years before normal retirement age to defer up to twice the annual dollar limit by utilizing unused prior-year deferral limits.
